name: ai-executive-os
description: One command: npm run dev | npm run prod — starts backend + frontend with matching env files.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.prod: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run prod --prefix backend" "npm run prod --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run setup --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend -- --ci
